description: A screenshot of a file selection dialog within a software interface, titled "IMD_2018_010m_al_03035_v020 > DATA". This dialog facilitates the ingestion of raster datasets. The main panel lists multiple TIFF files, all following a naming convention prefixed "IMD_2018_010m_", indicating High Resolution Layer (HRL) Imperviousness Density (IMD) data from the year 2018 with a 10-meter resolution. Examples of visible filenames include "IMD_2018_010m_E50N21_03035_v020.tif", "IMD_2018_010m_E52N19_03035_v020.tif", and "IMD_2018_010m_E51N20_03035_v020.tif". The 'Dateiname' (Filename) input field displays "IMD_2018_010m_E52N21_03035_v020.tif" as the selected file, and the file type filter is set to "Benutzerdefinierte Dateien (*.tif)" (User-defined Files (*.tif)). The interface includes navigation buttons, a "Neuer Ordner" (New Folder) button, a "DATA durchsuchen" (Search DATA) bar, and action buttons "Öffnen" (Open) and "Abbrechen" (Cancel). This screenshot demonstrates the process of selecting HRL Imperviousness (IMD) data, such as for Albania, for ingestion into the CLC+ Core system.
